positive: A stylized, circular celestial mandala design depicting interconnected cosmic elements. The main subject is a graceful, glowing nebula formed by abstract constellations and flowing bioluminescent flora, set against a deep indigo midnight background. Use a highly contrasting color palette of electric sapphire blue, vibrant emerald green, and shimmering gold leaf accents. The style should be a perfect blend of Art Nouveau linework and modern geometric minimalism, favoring crisp silhouettes and symmetry. Ensure the composition is perfectly centered, suitable for seamless repeating patterns or apparel printing. Include delicate geometric filigree and crescent moon motifs. Cinematic, highly detailed, perfect composition, high contrast, vector art style, 8k, print-ready.
